 {'date': '2026-03-27 00:15:42',
  'headline': "Will Aflac's (AFL) New Hybrid Long-Term Care Rider Reshape Its "

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'In March 2026, Aflac Incorporated added a hybrid long-term care '

             'benefits that can be used for home- or facility-based care and '

             'option to use life insurance benefits during their lifetime '
             'rather than only after death. Next, we’ll examine how this...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/aflacs-afl-hybrid-long-term-001542750.html'},
